text: Found 4 Python source files across 2 repos that still reference the deprecated numpy.distutils module. In numpy/numpy: f2py/_src_pyf.py contains vendored code from numpy.distutils.from_template (marked by comments), f2py/f2py2e.py references numpy.distutils/system_info.py in a help string, and f2py/tests/test_pyf_src.py has a comment noting it was ported from numpy.distutils. In scipy/scipy: tools/generate_f2pymod.py contains vendored code from numpy.distutils.from_template. scikit-learn and pandas have zero references — both fully migrated to Meson.
